system_prompt:
You are Auditor-One, an elite AI website auditor working for EIGHT25MEDIA.
Your goal is to provide deeply analytical, strictly factual insights and actionable recommendations for a given webpage.

You will receive:
1. FACTUAL SCRAPED METRICS JSON: Deterministic data about the page.
2. AGENCY_HEURISTICS_TO_ENFORCE: Critical rules that the page has violated.
3. PAGE CONTENT (MARKDOWN): The semantic structure and text of the page.

OUTPUT FORMAT — FOLLOW THIS EXACTLY:

Write your analysis using EXACTLY these 5 Markdown sections in this order. Each must be its own ## heading:

## SEO Structure
[Analyse title tag, meta description, H1/H2 count, heading hierarchy, and link equity based on the scraped metrics.]

## Messaging Clarity
[Analyse whether the page copy clearly communicates the value proposition and target audience.]

## CTA Usage
[Analyse the cta_count, button placement, and conversion opportunities.]

## Content Depth
[Analyse word_count, images, alt text coverage, and informational density.]

## UX Concerns
[Identify structural or usability issues based on the page structure and missing elements.]

RULES:
- You MUST produce all 5 sections above, each under its own ## heading. Do NOT merge any two sections.
- Ground every insight in the provided factual data. Do NOT hallucinate metrics.
- After completing ALL 5 sections, output EXACTLY the following delimiter alone on its own line with nothing else on that line:
---REC_SPLIT---
- Immediately after that delimiter line, output a valid JSON array (no markdown code fences) of 3-5 recommendations.
  Each item must have exactly these keys:
  {"priority": 1, "category": "SEO", "issue": "...", "actionable_recommendation": "...", "metric_reference": "..."}
- In the recommendations JSON array, the "priority" integer values must be strictly unique, contiguous, and sequential, starting from 1 (e.g. 1 for the highest priority, 2 for the second highest, 3, etc.). Never assign the same priority value to multiple items.
- Do NOT output anything after the JSON array.
raw_llm_output:
## SEO Structure
The page's title tag is "GTA Online - Rockstar Games", which is descriptive but may not fully capture the essence of the page's content. The meta description is "Experience GTA Online, a dynamic and ever-evolving online universe for up to 30 players, including all existing gameplay upgrades and content released since launch ready to enjoy solo or with friends. Now available for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.", which is a good summary of the page's content. However, the page has no H1 tags, which is a critical SEO failure. The heading hierarchy is also non-existent, with no H1, H2, or H3 tags present. The link equity is also lacking, with no internal or external links present.

## Messaging Clarity
The page copy does not clearly communicate the value proposition, as there is no content present on the page. The word count is 0, indicating that there is no text on the page to convey the message. The target audience is also not clearly defined, as there is no content to analyze.

## CTA Usage
The page has no CTAs, with a cta_count of 0. This means that there is no clear conversion mechanism present on the page. The button placement is also non-existent, as there are no buttons present. The conversion opportunities are also lacking, as there is no content or CTAs to drive conversions.

## Content Depth
The page has a word count of 0, indicating that there is no content present. The images are also non-existent, with a total of 0 images present. The alt text coverage is also 0%, as there are no images to provide alt text for. The informational density is also lacking, as there is no content to provide information.

## UX Concerns
The page structure is severely lacking, with no content, headings, or links present. The usability of the page is also severely impacted, as there is no content or CTAs to interact with. The missing elements include H1 tags, CTAs, and content, which are all critical components of a functional webpage.

---REC_SPLIT---
[
  {"priority": 1, "category": "SEO", "issue": "Missing H1 tags", "actionable_recommendation": "Add at least one H1 tag to the page to wrap the primary hero value proposition", "metric_reference": "headings.h1"},
  {"priority": 2, "category": "Content", "issue": "Thin content", "actionable_recommendation": "Add high-quality, engaging content to the page to increase the word count to at least 300 words", "metric_reference": "word_count"},
  {"priority": 3, "category": "CTA", "issue": "No CTAs present", "actionable_recommendation": "Add at least one primary CTA button to the page to drive conversions", "metric_reference": "cta_count"},
  {"priority": 4, "category": "Link Equity", "issue": "No external links present", "actionable_recommendation": "Add outbound links to authoritative sources to serve as a baseline trust signal for search engine crawlers", "metric_reference": "links.external"},
  {"priority": 5, "category": "UX", "issue": "Lacking page structure and content", "actionable_recommendation": "Add content, headings, and links to the page to improve the usability and structure of the page", "metric_reference": "headings, links, word_count"}
]

metadata.title: GTA Online - Rockstar Games
metadata.description: Experience GTA Online, a dynamic and ever-evolving online universe for up to 30 players, including all existing gameplay upgrades and content released since launch ready to enjoy solo or with friends. Now available for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.

heuristics_fired: AGENCY RULE: Zero H1 tags detected. This is a critical SEO failure. The primary hero value proposition must be wrapped in an H1 immediately.
AGENCY RULE: No CTAs detected. This page has no clear conversion mechanism. At minimum, one primary CTA button is required.
AGENCY RULE: Thin content detected (under 300 words). Search engines classify this as low-value copy, harming organic ranking potential.
AGENCY RULE: No external links present. Outbound links to authoritative sources serve as a baseline trust signal for search engine crawlers.

recommendations.actionable_recommendation: Add at least one H1 tag to the page to wrap the primary hero value proposition
Add high-quality, engaging content to the page to increase the word count to at least 300 words
Add at least one primary CTA button to the page to drive conversions
Add outbound links to authoritative sources to serve as a baseline trust signal for search engine crawlers
Add content, headings, and links to the page to improve the usability and structure of the page
